title: Swipe right, next screen
scenario: Quick Start Guide screen navigation: swiping right from right side cycles through onboarding screens showing earbuds, charge case outside, and charge case inside
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app
If this is a fresh install or first launch, the Quick Start Guide (QSG) onboarding flow should appear
On the first QSG screen, swipe right from the right edge of the screen
Observe the next onboarding screen showing two earbuds
Swipe right again from the right edge of the screen
Observe the next onboarding screen showing the charge case (outside view)
Swipe right again from the right edge of the screen
Observe the next onboarding screen showing the charge case (inside view)
expected: Each QSG screen displays the correct illustration (two earbuds, charge case outside, charge case inside) matching the Figma design. Swiping right from the right side of the screen smoothly transitions to the next onboarding screen.
